channel.title: Docker on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on Arrans github.io

item.title: goreleaser/goreleaser
item.description: Deliver Go binaries as fast and easily as possible

item.title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: argoproj/argo-cd
item.description: Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

item.title: xthursdayx/yacreaderlibrary-server-docker
item.description: Docker image running a headless version of YACReaderLibraryServer 📦

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and product roadmaps in the simplest way possible.

item.title: 89luca89/distrobox
item.description: Use any linux distribution inside your terminal. Enable both backward and forward compatibility with software and freedom to use whatever distribution you’re more comfortable with. Mirror available at: https://gitlab.com/89luca89/distrobox

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Your backend, minus the hassle.

item.title: NilsIrl/dockerc
item.description: container image to single executable compiler

item.title: photoview/photoview
item.description: Photo gallery for self-hosted personal servers

item.title: sickcodes/Docker-OSX
item.description: Run macOS VM in a Docker! Run near native OSX-KVM in Docker! X11 Forwarding! CI/CD for OS X Security Research! Docker mac Containers.

item.title: drakkan/sftpgo
item.description: Full-featured and highly configurable SFTP, HTTP/S, FTP/S and WebDAV server - S3, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob

item.title: AbdBarho/stable-diffusion-webui-docker
item.description: Easy Docker setup for Stable Diffusion with user-friendly UI

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps

item.title: rook/rook
item.description: Storage Orchestration for Kubernetes

item.title: xpipe-io/xpipe
item.description: Your entire server infrastructure at your fingertips

item.title: outline/outline
item.description: The fastest knowledge base for growing teams. Beautiful, realtime collaborative, feature packed, and markdown compatible.

item.title: traefik/traefik
item.description: The Cloud Native Application Proxy

item.title: dagger/dagger
item.description: An engine to run your pipelines in containers

item.title: gogs/gogs
item.description: Gogs is a painless self-hosted Git service

item.title: openfaas/faas
item.description: OpenFaaS - Serverless Functions Made Simple

item.title: kubernetes-sigs/kind
item.description: Kubernetes IN Docker - local clusters for testing Kubernetes

item.title: aws/aws-sam-cli
item.description: CLI tool to build, test, debug, and deploy Serverless applications using AWS SAM

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: ruanbekker/cheatsheets
item.description: My Cheatsheet Repository

item.title: sismics/docs
item.description: Lightweight document management system packed with all the features you can expect from big expensive solutions

item.title: metacall/core
item.description: MetaCall: The ultimate polyglot programming experience.

item.title: bcicen/ctop
item.description: Top-like interface for container metrics

item.title: v-byte-cpu/sx
item.description: 🖖 Fast, modern, easy-to-use network scanner

item.title: JetBrains/projector-docker
item.description: Run JetBrains IDEs remotely with Docker

item.title: fboulnois/stable-diffusion-docker
item.description: Run the official Stable Diffusion releases in a Docker container with txt2img, img2img, depth2img, pix2pix, upscale4x, and inpaint.

item.title: fat-tire/resolve
item.description: Container scripts to build and run DaVinci Resolve [Studio] for Linux using Docker or Podman

item.title: bleenco/abstruse
item.description: Abstruse is a free and open-source CI/CD platform that tests your models and code.

item.title: ad-on-is/resticity
item.description: A beautiful cross-platform UI for restic backup.
